'''Jen Shryne''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Weytta]] and a loyal citizen of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He and his wife [[Jula Shryne]] had a son, [[Roan Shryne]], who like his mother was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].

==Biography==
While Jula was abroad pursuing her [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] career, Jen gave their son—against Jula's will—to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. This angered Jula to the point that she left Jen. Nonetheless, when Jula was reunited with her son after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], she hoped that Roan would eventually get to reunite with Jen. However, Roan was killed before such could occur.

{{Char-stub}}
